top_signals.title: Oil prices ease after spiking following fresh U.S. strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump turns on Spain and demands Greenland as NATO summit exposes cracks
top_signals.summary: The office of Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said it was treating Trump’s statements as business as usual, adding bilateral relations benefited both nations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Legado de Fujimori desafía ofensiva anti-China de Trump en Perú
top_signals.summary: Keiko Fujimori podría ser el tipo de líder que Donald Trump desea en América Latina. Pero los profundos vínculos de Perú con China muestran lo difícil que será para Washington revertir los avances de Pekín en la región. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Grid operator issues fresh heatwave warning over power supplies
top_signals.summary: The energy grid operator has warned that the “extreme temperatures” from this week’s heatwave could hit power supplies on Thursday night, as households’ use of fans and air conditioner place a record strain on our electricity system. The National Energy System Operator (Neso) issued a rare overnight notice calling on energy companies to generate additional [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Yields Little Changed as Markets Wait for Fed Minutes - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Treasury Yields Little Changed as Markets Wait for Fed Minutes  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Philip R. Lane: AI and monetary policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Qatar Pauses Push to Ramp Up LNG After Hormuz Tanker Attack
top_signals.summary: Qatar is pausing efforts to rapidly revive production at the world’s largest liquefied natural gas facility after an attack on one of its tankers in the Strait of Hormuz raised fears that transit through the crucial waterway is still too risky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ohio is America's Top State for Business in 2026, capping yearslong rise with first No. 1 finish
top_signals.summary: Ohio tops CNBC's rankings for the first time in 2026, with the Buckeye State culminating a yearslong climb as the place to do business in America.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
